issues.detail: The skill does not cover all possible error scenarios such as invalid input or network failures.
The instructions contain verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.
The skill is tailored to Node.js environments and does not support other platforms.

scenarios.name: blog-api-cursor-pagination
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Relay-style PostConnection/PostEdge/PageInfo with base64-encoded id cursors and throws GraphQLError with extensions.code UNAUTHENTICATED; baseline invents a flat PostFeed shape, uses raw ids as cursors, and throws a generic Error.

scenarios.name: dataloader-n-plus-1
scenarios.rationale: Treatment builds a Map then remaps ids to preserve input order, exposes the loader via dataSources in context, and calls it from Post.author; baseline uses DataLoader but acknowledges ordering is unreliable and never fixes it.
